1,Multiple AI-Agents (Debate-Based),[Debate][Turn 1] Rationale A1,1,1,,"Based on the system configuration and evaluation metrics, I recommend activating the Client Selector with a selection_value of 3. This is because the client_selector should be ON when there are differences in client CPUs to reduce the Straggler effect. The CPUs are [5,5,5,3,3], so a threshold of 3 will drop the two clients with 3 CPUs, leaving three clients with 5 CPUs active. This should reduce Total Round Time and Training Time without compromising model diversity, as at least two clients remain active. Additionally, the Heterogeneous Data Handler should be ON because there are non-IID clients (clients 1,2,4), and enabling HDH once early can mitigate non-IID effects. The Message Compressor remains OFF because there is no clear bottleneck in communication time, and it may introduce overhead without benefit. This decision is consistent with previous configurations and addresses the non-IID data issue.
CS=ON
